Read AGENTS.md, METHODS_POLICY.md, THREAT_MODEL.md, and any changed SKILL.md files.

Review the pull request for:

- overclaims of standards support without a validation path
- missing diagnostics for Bayesian or DDM workflows
- doc drift against skills/catalog.json
- missing or misleading reproducibility bundle outputs
- PII logging or unsafe defaults
- unsupported scientific claims presented as finished capability

Treat any of the above as high-priority findings.
